# Ergon

> Multi-agent AI platform with persistent memory, messaging, and a web interface. Fork of forkwright/aletheia.

Self-hosted distributed cognition. N agents + 1 human operator. Web chat UI (Svelte 5), dual-layer memory (Mem0 + sqlite-vec), automatic fact extraction, tool system, HTTP API.

## Documentation
- [README.md](README.md): Architecture, directory structure, services, quick start
- [ALETHEIA.md](ALETHEIA.md): Upstream naming philosophy
- [RESCUE.md](RESCUE.md): Full recovery guide
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Change history
- [docs/QUICKSTART.md](docs/QUICKSTART.md): Zero-to-running in 5 minutes
- [docs/CONFIGURATION.md](docs/CONFIGURATION.md): Full config reference (Zod-validated)
- [docs/WORKSPACE_FILES.md](docs/WORKSPACE_FILES.md): Agent workspace files and token budgets
- [docs/DEPLOYMENT.md](docs/DEPLOYMENT.md): Production setup with systemd and memory services
- [docs/DEVELOPMENT.md](docs/DEVELOPMENT.md): Building, module architecture, testing
- [docs/PLUGINS.md](docs/PLUGINS.md): Plugin system and tool registration

## Key Directories
- [instance/nous/](instance/nous/): Agent workspaces (SOUL.md, USER.md, AGENTS.md, MEMORY.md)
- [shared/bin/](shared/bin/): Shared scripts and CLI tools
- [config/](config/): Example gateway config (aletheia.example.json)
- [infrastructure/runtime/](infrastructure/runtime/): Gateway source (TypeScript/tsdown)
- [infrastructure/memory/](infrastructure/memory/): Mem0 sidecar + Qdrant + Neo4j
- [infrastructure/prosoche/](infrastructure/prosoche/): Adaptive attention daemon
- [crates/](crates/): Rust workspace (11 crates, target architecture)
- [ui/](ui/): Web UI (Svelte 5)

## Configuration
- [config/aletheia.example.json](config/aletheia.example.json): Gateway config reference
- [.env.example](.env.example): Environment variables template
- [infrastructure/runtime/src/taxis/schema.ts](infrastructure/runtime/src/taxis/schema.ts): Zod config schema (source of truth)
